label: Meteora DLMM range watch
description: Poll a Meteora DLMM pool's active bin and compare to position bin range. The step **completes** when the active price moves **outside** the position range (i.e. the user's liquidity is no longer active). Save the drift direction ('above' or 'below') to a variable for downstream branching. Use in always-on workflows to trigger rebalancing or exit logic.

inputs.description: LB pair (pool) address. Template vars supported: {{poolAddress}}.
How often to check the active bin (default 30s).
Maximum wait time (0 = wait forever until out of range).

outputs.description: Row variable: 'above' (price rose past upper bin) or 'below' (price fell past lower bin).
Row variable: active bin ID at the time drift was detected.
Row variable: JSON object with lowerBinId, upperBinId, activeBinId.

formSchema.label: Position address
formSchema.hint: The DLMM position to monitor. Use a variable from a previous add-liquidity step.

formSchema.label: Poll interval (ms)
formSchema.hint: How often to check the pool's active bin. Default 30 seconds. Min 5 seconds.

formSchema.label: Timeout (ms, 0 = no limit)
formSchema.hint: Max wait time. 0 means wait indefinitely until price exits range.

formSchema.label: Save drift direction to variable
formSchema.hint: 'above' or 'below' — use in downstream conditional steps.

formSchema.label: Save active bin ID to variable
